name: Trees
description: Traverse hierarchical node structures, validate invariants, and find node depths.
learning_objectives: Deconstruct tree shapes using recursive Depth-First Search methods
Validate binary search tree order invariants on parent-child pairs

patterns.name: DFS Traversal
patterns.description: Visit tree branches deeply using recursion stacks or helper queues before evaluating neighbors.

concepts.name: Recursive Node Visits
concepts.theory_markdown:
# Recursive Node Visits

Depth-First Search (DFS) traverses a tree by traversing a child branch as deeply as possible before backtracking.

### The Core Idea

- Pre-order (Node, Left, Right)
- In-order (Left, Node, Right)
- Post-order (Left, Right, Node)
learning_objectives: Implement recursive pre-, in-, and post-order tree walks
Evaluate tree height and maximum path metrics
